title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 300.350 - Riding bicycles, sleds, roller skates, by attaching to another vehicle, prohibited — pulling a rider behind vehicle prohibited
text:
300.350.  Riding bicycles, sleds, roller skates, by attaching to another vehicle, prohibited — pulling a rider behind vehicle prohibited. — No person riding upon any bicycle, motorized bicycle, coaster, roller skates, sled or toy vehicle shall attach the same or himself to any vehicle upon a roadway.  Neither shall the driver of a vehicle knowingly pull a rider behind a vehicle.
(L. 1965 p. 445 § 71, A.L. 1980 H.B. 995 & 1051, A.L. 2002 H.B. 1270 and H.B. 2032)
